creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: feld
Date: Wed Aug 17 18:13:37 UTC 2016
New revision: 420361
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/420361

Log:
  net-mgmt/rancid3: Add experimental support for Comware devices

  Comware support has been added via a port option. It is not enabled by
  default as upstream has not been able to validate the reliability of
  this enhancement.

  PR:		209361

Changes:
  head/net-mgmt/rancid3/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/rancid3/files/cmw.pm
  head/net-mgmt/rancid3/files/cmwlogin
  head/net-mgmt/rancid3/files/comware_types.conf
  head/net-mgmt/rancid3/pkg-plist
